name: Mock Caviar
recipeIngredient: 2 small cans chopped ripe olives or
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped olives, anchovies, salad oil, lemon juice, sour cream, green onions, and hard-boiled eggs in a bowl.
2. Cover the mixture and chill until ready to serve.
3. When serving, line a chilled serving dish with lettuce leaves.
4. Pile the olive mixture onto the lettuce.
5. Top with sour cream and sprinkle with additional green onions.
